name: nanobanana-ppt-skills
description: AI-powered PPT generation with document analysis and styled images
capabilities: Provide PPT creation patterns and guidance
Support slide layout and design suggestions
author: sickn33
securitySummary: This skill is a documentation-only file (SKILL.md) containing metadata and guidance for AI-powered PPT generation. Static findings flagged as 'Hardcoded URL' and 'Weak cryptographic algorithm' are false positives - the URLs are repository references in metadata, and no cryptographic algorithms exist in this file. No executable code is present. This skill is safe for publication.
valueStatement: This skill enables AI-powered PowerPoint generation with document analysis capabilities and styled image integration. Users can create professional presentations efficiently using AI assistance.
limitations: Skill provides guidance patterns only, not direct PPT file generation
Requires external AI model integration for actual generation
Implementation depends on user's AI setup

useCases.targetUser: Business professionals needing quick presentation creation
useCases.title: Business Presentation Creation
useCases.description: Generate professional business presentations using AI analysis of source documents

useCases.targetUser: Teachers and educators preparing course materials
useCases.title: Educational Content Development
useCases.description: Create educational slides from research documents and notes

useCases.title: Report Visualization
useCases.description: Transform data reports into visual presentations

promptTemplates.title: Basic PPT Request
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a PowerPoint presentation about [TOPIC] with [NUMBER] slides

promptTemplates.title: Document-Based Slides
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze this document and create a presentation with key points: [PASTE DOCUMENT]

promptTemplates.title: Styled Image Integration
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a presentation about [TOPIC] and include styled images for each slide

promptTemplates.title: Complete Presentation Package
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a professional presentation including structure, content, and design suggestions for [TOPIC]

bestPractices: Provide clear topic descriptions when requesting presentations
Specify the number of slides needed for appropriate depth
Include any specific design preferences or branding requirements
Use document analysis for converting existing content into slides
antiPatterns: Avoid vague requests like 'make a presentation' without context
Do not expect the skill to directly generate .pptx files
Avoid requesting extremely long presentations in a single prompt
Do not skip providing source material for document-based requests

faq.question: Can this skill directly create PowerPoint files?
faq.answer: No, this skill provides guidance and patterns for AI-powered PPT generation. Actual file creation requires integration with PPT generation tools.

faq.question: What AI tools work with this skill?
faq.answer: This skill supports Claude, Codex, and Claude Code for generating presentation content and structure.

faq.question: How do I create styled images for slides?
faq.answer: Use the skill's guidance to prompt AI models to generate image descriptions that can be used with image generation tools.

faq.question: Can I convert existing documents to presentations?
faq.answer: Yes, provide the document content to the AI with the document analysis prompt template.

faq.question: What types of presentations work best?
faq.answer: Business reports, educational content, technical summaries, and overview presentations work well with AI generation.

faq.question: Do I need programming knowledge to use this skill?
faq.answer: No, the skill provides natural language prompts that any user can employ for presentation creation.
